overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The character crosses streets, enters a ramen shop, and explores elevated walkways while surrounded by towering skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements.

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at towering buildings and billboards
character crosses the street among moving vehicles

agents.ego_description: walking across a neon-lit crosswalk while looking up at towering skyscrapers

notable_agents.action: tattooed pedestrian in white shirt walking in opposite direction

entered.detail: large teal illuminated sign reading DTR on a dark skyscraper
yellow zebra crossing lines on wet asphalt
large digital screen displaying animated cyberpunk imagery
yellow neon signage for a commercial establishment

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a rain-slicked crosswalk in a futuristic city at night. The character walks forward as the camera tilts up to reveal towering skyscrapers covered in neon advertisements, including a prominent DTR sign. The character then crosses the street among sparse traffic, with holographic billboards illuminating the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk with storefronts and signage

events.description: character turns right at the street corner

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past various storefronts and street signs

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with blue hair and tattooed arms walking ahead

entered.detail: blue neon sign reading RIFLES & PISTOLS above a storefront
street sign indicating speed limit of 40
metal barrier separating sidewalk from street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a concrete sidewalk lined with neon storefronts, passing a Rifles & Pistols sign and a speed limit sign. A pedestrian with distinctive blue hair walks ahead as the character turns the corner, with street railings visible along the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching outdoor ramen shop with counter seating

events.description: character enters the restaurant through the open front

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering a street-side ramen shop with outdoor seating

entered.detail: green neon sign with Japanese characters reading キャラバン
white counter with green stools where customers sit
traditional red Chinese lanterns hanging above the counter

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a street-side eatery with a glowing green Charon sign and traditional red paper lanterns. The restaurant features an open-air counter with green stools where customers sit. The character walks past the outdoor seating and enters the establishment.

scene_state.functional_zone: intimate ramen shop interior with counter seating

events.description: character stops at the counter to observe the kitchen

agents.ego_description: standing at the counter watching the chef prepare food in the kitchen

notable_agents.action: chef cooking at the stove with steam rising from woks

entered.detail: commercial kitchen with woks, steam, and cooking equipment
advertisement poster on the tiled wall
white counter with bowls, chopsticks, and menus

segments.scene_description: Inside the cozy ramen shop, red paper lanterns cast a warm glow over the counter. The character stands at the counter observing a chef cooking in the back kitchen, where steam rises from woks. The interior features tiled walls with advertisements and a narrow doorway leading to the back alley.

scene_state.functional_zone: back alley with market banners leading to street stairs

events.description: character exits the restaurant through the back alley
character begins ascending concrete stairs to elevated walkway

agents.ego_description: exiting through the back alley, passing a smoking woman, and climbing stairs

notable_agents.action: woman in red top smoking near a stone lantern
couple embracing near the vending machine

entered.detail: red vertical banner with white text and spiral design
red neon sign indicating adult content
wide staircase leading up to elevated pedestrian walkway

segments.scene_description: The character exits through a narrow back alley featuring a Masami Market banner and passes a woman smoking near a stone lantern. The alley opens to the street where a couple embraces near an 18+ neon sign. The character then approaches and begins climbing a wide concrete staircase leading upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with view of mega skyscraper

events.description: camera tilts up to look at the towering building with holographic display

agents.ego_description: walking along an elevated walkway while admiring the towering skyscrapers

entered.detail: raised pedestrian path with yellow tactile paving strip
massive skyscraper with large pink holographic display of a face
blue-green metal railing along the edge of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character reaches an elevated pedestrian walkway offering a panoramic view of the city. Walking along the path with teal safety barriers, the camera tilts up to reveal a massive skyscraper adorned with a giant pink holographic display. The walkway provides an elevated perspective of the neon-lit streets below with sparse traffic moving along the road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked futuristic city, transitioning from the neon-lit street level into a cozy eatery and finally ascending to an elevated urban vista. It begins at a crosswalk where the camera tilts up toward towering skyscrapers and holographic billboards before following the character along a concrete sidewalk lined with glowing storefronts. As the character turns a corner, the scene shifts from the open street into a street-side eatery marked by green signs and red lanterns, moving seamlessly from the outdoor seating into a steamy ramen shop interior. The camera then tracks the character through a narrow back alley past a stone lantern and embracing couples before turning toward a wide concrete staircase. Finally, the movement culminates on an elevated pedestrian walkway with teal barriers, where the perspective opens up to reveal a panoramic view of the city and a massive pink holographic display atop a distant skyscraper.
